description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a prominent cross-gabled roof covered in dark brown shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from a combination of stone and wood, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. A covered porch with wooden posts and railings extends from the front, providing a welcoming entryway. The structure sits on a landscaped plot with a curved stone pathway leading to the entrance and a wooden fence enclosing the yard. Multiple windows are distributed along the facades, with a mix of single and grouped arrangements, allowing ample natural light inside. The overall design reflects a Craftsman architectural style, emphasizing natural materials and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story Craftsman-style bungalow with a cross-gabled roof, stone and wood exterior, covered porch, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and stone pathway leading up to the door.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the porch, side windows, and the intersection of the cross-gabled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, extended roofline, and the wooden fence enclosing the yard.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the building, side windows, and the continuation of the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and single windows on multiple facades
